title: 目標達成の後に・目指すはテッペンでい

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, close to the end of Inari One's junior
year...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I think this one went pretty well, Boss! How's my
time?!
choice_data_list: You're right, you hit your target again!
You're right, you hit your target again!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I think this one went pretty well, Boss! How's my
time?!
choice_data_list: You're right, you hit your target again!
You're right, you hit your target again!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Yesss! Looks like we hit the sweet spot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In fact, Inari One has progressed far beyond my
expectations. At this rate, we should be able to
tackle bigger races starting next year!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hey, Boss. Can we have a little chat durin' break?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
...Hey, Boss. Can we have a little chat durin'
break?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I'm nearin' my classic year, so I wanted to
get your advice on somethin'.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I thought about this all through my junior year...
What could I do to make a big name for myself,
to get everyone's eyes on me?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
After all that thinkin', I came up with an idea to
reach the top.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
If you're the best in the field, no one's got a
choice but to look up to ya... Right?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
That's why I want to make reachin' the top my
next goal!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: But just reaching the top isn't enough for me. Which is why I gotta do it twice! I'm aimin' for both the top of the centrals and the regionals!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
As a transfer who grew up with the regionals, I
think this monument of a goal is somethin' only I
can do.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: So, tell me, whaddya think?
choice_data_list: I think it's an amazing goal!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The top, the best, the strongest... Everyone is
different in how they define what they see as the
pinnacle of success.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And this particular goal screams "Inari One." With
a personality like hers, she can definitely grab the
attention of the masses!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, glad we're on the same page! Now here's
where things get sticky...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: It's easy to say I wanna reach the top of the regionals and centrals, but how exactly do I do it?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I think it's gonna take more than winnin' a buncha
races. I just can't pin down what that "more" could
be.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During her classic year, she can dominate the
Tokyo Daishoten at Oi Racecourse. Then, in her
senior year, if she performs well in central G1s...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That could earn her the prestigious title of
Umamusume of the Year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It would prove Inari One, the transfer from the
regionals, is a top-class runner.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: ...Whoa.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: THAT SOUNDS AMAZIN'!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I love that idea! There couldn't be a better way to
stand boldly in front of everyone and declare,
"I'm on top of the world!"

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
It's settled. After dominatin' the regionals, I'm
gunnin' for Umamusume of the Year in the
centrals!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Startin' today, that's the kind of "top" I wanna
aim for!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
All right, the first hurdle we've got comin' is the
Tokyo Daishoten!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Tokyo Daishoten won't be happening until
the end of next year. In the meantime, we should
focus on getting more experience at Oi
Racecourse!
choice_data_list: Let's enter the Japan Dirt Derby!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Japan Dirt Derby happens to be the biggest
dirt race in a runner's classic year, making it the
perfect stepping stone.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I get it. Ya want me to test my strength first. Hey,
standin' at the top of the Japan Dirt Derby
doesn't sound half bad!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Ooooh! I'm all fired up now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we get ready to start the classic year with
a new goal to reach the top!
